agent-md-refactor.name: agent-md-refactor
agent-md-refactor.description: Refactor bloated AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md, or similar agent instruction files to follow progressive disclosure principles. Splits monolithic files into organized, linked documentation.
agent-md-refactor.author: softaworks
agent-md-refactor.display_name: 别让AI读长文，拆成小册子
agent-md-refactor.display_desc: 把又臭又长的AI指令文件拆成有层次的小文档，AI读得快，理解准。
agent-md-refactor.scenario: 当你给AI写的AGENTS.md越来越臃肿，AI开始忽略关键指令时，用它重构。

baoyu-article-illustrator.name: baoyu-article-illustrator
baoyu-article-illustrator.description: Analyzes article structure, identifies positions requiring visual aids, generates illustrations with Type × Style × Palette three-dimension approach. Use when user asks to "illustrate article", "add images", "generate images for article", or "为文章配图".
baoyu-article-illustrator.author: JimLiu
baoyu-article-illustrator.display_name: 文章配图不用愁，自动生成
baoyu-article-illustrator.display_desc: 自动分析文章结构，找到需要配图的地方，按类型、风格、配色三要素生成插图，省去自己找图的麻烦。
baoyu-article-illustrator.scenario: 写完文章想配图，但不知道配什么、怎么配的时候

baoyu-comic.name: baoyu-comic
baoyu-comic.description: Knowledge comic creator supporting multiple art styles and tones. Creates original educational comics with detailed panel layouts and batch-capable image generation. Use when user asks to create "知识漫画", "教育漫画", "biography comic", "tutorial comic", or "Logicomix-style comic".
baoyu-comic.author: JimLiu
baoyu-comic.display_name: 把知识点画成漫画，谁都能看懂
baoyu-comic.display_desc: 自动把复杂知识变成漫画，支持多种画风，还能批量出图，适合做教程或科普。
baoyu-comic.scenario: 想做个知识科普或教程漫画，但不会画图，又嫌手绘太慢。

baoyu-cover-image.name: baoyu-cover-image
baoyu-cover-image.description: Generates article cover images with 5 dimensions (type, palette, rendering, text, mood) combining 11 color palettes and 7 rendering styles. Supports cinematic (2.35:1), widescreen (16:9), and square (1:1) aspects. Use when user asks to "generate cover image", "create article cover", or "make cover".
baoyu-cover-image.author: JimLiu
baoyu-cover-image.display_name: 文章封面不用愁，5维定制秒出图
baoyu-cover-image.display_desc: 选配色、定风格、调比例，5个维度搞定封面，不用再求设计师。
baoyu-cover-image.scenario: 写公众号或博客，需要一张不撞款的封面图时。

baoyu-post-to-wechat.name: baoyu-post-to-wechat
baoyu-post-to-wechat.description: Posts content to WeChat Official Account (微信公众号) via API or Chrome CDP. Supports article posting (文章) with HTML, markdown, or plain text input, and image-text posting (贴图, formerly 图文) with multiple images. Markdown article workflows default to converting ordinary external links into bottom citations for WeChat-friendly output. Use when user mentions "发布公众号", "post to wechat", "微信公众号", or "贴图/图文/文章".
baoyu-post-to-wechat.author: JimLiu
baoyu-post-to-wechat.display_name: 写好的内容，一键发到公众号
baoyu-post-to-wechat.display_desc: 帮你把 Markdown、HTML 或纯文本直接发布到微信公众号，支持文章和贴图两种模式，外链自动转底部引用。
baoyu-post-to-wechat.scenario: 你在编辑器里写完一篇公众号文章，想直接发布而不是复制粘贴到后台。

baoyu-post-to-x.name: baoyu-post-to-x
baoyu-post-to-x.description: Posts content and articles to X (Twitter). Supports regular posts with images/videos and X Articles (long-form Markdown). In Codex, honor explicit requests for the Codex Chrome plugin/@chrome by using the Chrome Extension workflow; otherwise use Chrome Computer Use when available and fall back to real Chrome CDP scripts only when allowed. Use when user asks to "post to X", "tweet", "publish to Twitter", or "share on X".
baoyu-post-to-x.author: JimLiu
baoyu-post-to-x.display_desc: 自动帮你把内容发到X（Twitter），支持图文、视频和长文章，省去手动登录的麻烦。
baoyu-post-to-x.scenario: 当你写完一篇博客或设计好一张海报，想快速同步到X时。

baoyu-slide-deck.name: baoyu-slide-deck
baoyu-slide-deck.description: Generates professional slide deck images from content. Creates outlines with style instructions, then generates individual slide images. Use when user asks to "create slides", "make a presentation", "generate deck", "slide deck", or "PPT".
baoyu-slide-deck.author: JimLiu
baoyu-slide-deck.display_name: 别熬夜做PPT了，把内容丢进来
baoyu-slide-deck.display_desc: 把文字或大纲丢进去，自动生成一套风格统一的幻灯片图片，省去排版烦恼。
baoyu-slide-deck.scenario: 老板让你明天汇报，但你还没开始做PPT的时候。

baoyu-xhs-images.name: baoyu-xhs-images
baoyu-xhs-images.description: Generates infographic image card series with 12 visual styles, 8 layouts, and 3 color palettes. Breaks content into 1-10 cartoon-style image cards optimized for social media engagement. Use when user mentions "小红书图片", "小红书种草", "小绿书", "微信图文", "微信贴图", "image cards", "图片卡片", baoyu-xhs-images, or wants social media infographic series.
baoyu-xhs-images.author: JimLiu
baoyu-xhs-images.display_name: 小红书爆款图文一键生成
baoyu-xhs-images.display_desc: 输入内容，自动拆成多张卡通风格信息图卡片，适配小红书、微信等社交平台，省去设计排版时间。
baoyu-xhs-images.scenario: 运营小红书或公众号，需要快速制作系列图文卡片时，直接丢文案进去就能出图。

better-auth-best-practices.name: better-auth-best-practices
better-auth-best-practices.description: Configure Better Auth server and client, set up database adapters, manage sessions, add plugins, and handle environment variables. Use when users mention Better Auth, betterauth, auth.ts, or need to set up TypeScript authentication with email/password, OAuth, or plugin configuration.
better-auth-best-practices.author: better-auth
better-auth-best-practices.display_name: 别自己写登录了，用 Better Auth 吧
better-auth-best-practices.display_desc: 教你用 Better Auth 配好邮箱、OAuth 和数据库，不用从零造轮子。
better-auth-best-practices.scenario: 当项目需要用户登录、注册，或者要加第三方登录时，直接套这个模板。

bibi.name: bibi
bibi.description: AI video & audio summarizer + repackager. Summarize YouTube, Bilibili, podcasts, TikTok, Twitter/X, Xiaohongshu, and any online video or audio, then optionally turn the takeaway into a TikTok-style vertical music video. Use when the user wants to summarize a video, extract transcripts/subtitles, get chapter-by-chapter summaries, understand video content quickly, or remix a long-form video into a short vertical MV. Triggers: "summarize this video", "what's this video about", "extract subtitles", "总结这个视频", "帮我看看这个视频讲了什么", "video summary", "podcast notes", "YouTube summary", "B站总结", "get transcript", "video to notes", "video to TikTok MV", "把视频变成 TikTok", "video to song", "做一个 TikTok 视频". Works via bibi CLI (macOS/Windows) or OpenAPI (Linux / any platform without CLI).
bibi.author: JimmyLv
bibi.display_name: 视频太长不想看？让它自己总结
bibi.display_desc: AI 帮你总结任何视频/音频，还能一键变成 TikTok 短视频。省时间，不费眼。
bibi.scenario: 刷到 B 站或 YouTube 长视频，没时间看，想快速知道重点。

brainstorming.name: brainstorming
brainstorming.description: You MUST use this before any creative work - creating features, building components, adding functionality, or modifying behavior. Explores user intent, requirements and design before implementation.
brainstorming.author: obra
brainstorming.display_name: 别急着做功能，先想清楚问题
brainstorming.display_desc: 动手前先花几分钟理清用户到底要什么，避免白干一场。
brainstorming.scenario: 当你准备加新功能或改代码前，先用它来确认需求和意图。

c4-architecture.name: c4-architecture
c4-architecture.description: Generate architecture documentation using C4 model Mermaid diagrams. Use when asked to create architecture diagrams, document system architecture, visualize software structure, create C4 diagrams, or generate context/container/component/deployment diagrams. Triggers include "architecture diagram", "C4 diagram", "system context", "container diagram", "component diagram", "deployment diagram", "document architecture", "visualize architecture".
c4-architecture.author: softaworks
c4-architecture.display_name: 画架构图别从零开始，用C4模板
c4-architecture.display_desc: 用C4模型+Mermaid自动生成系统架构图，省去手画和排版的时间。
c4-architecture.scenario: 写技术文档或做架构评审时，需要快速画出上下文、容器、组件或部署图。

codex.name: codex
codex.description: Use when the user asks to run Codex CLI (codex exec, codex resume) or references OpenAI Codex for code analysis, refactoring, or automated editing. Uses GPT-5.2 by default for state-of-the-art software engineering.
codex.author: softaworks
codex.display_name: 别手动改代码了，让AI替你重构
codex.display_desc: 用GPT-5.2帮你分析、重构、自动编辑代码，省下抠细节的时间。
codex.scenario: 接手一堆烂代码，想快速理清逻辑并自动优化时

command-creator.name: command-creator
command-creator.description: This skill should be used when creating a Claude Code slash command. Use when users ask to "create a command", "make a slash command", "add a command", or want to document a workflow as a reusable command. Essential for creating optimized, agent-executable slash commands with proper structure and best practices.
command-creator.author: softaworks
command-creator.display_name: 把重复工作变成一句话命令
command-creator.display_desc: 把你的工作流写成 AI 能直接执行的斜杠命令，省去每次手动重复的麻烦。
command-creator.scenario: 当你总在做同一套操作（比如部署、测试、写周报），想把它变成一条 /xxx 命令让 AI 自动执行时。

commit-work.name: commit-work
commit-work.description: Create high-quality git commits: review/stage intended changes, split into logical commits, and write clear commit messages (including Conventional Commits). Use when the user asks to commit, craft a commit message, stage changes, or split work into multiple commits.
commit-work.author: softaworks
commit-work.display_desc: 帮你把改动的代码拆成有意义的commit，写好规范的commit message，告别一团乱麻。
commit-work.scenario: 准备提交代码时，发现改动太多、不知道怎么写commit message，或者想按功能拆成多个commit。

copy-editing.name: copy-editing
copy-editing.description: When the user wants to edit, review, or improve existing marketing copy, or refresh outdated content. Also use when the user mentions 'edit this copy,' 'review my copy,' 'copy feedback,' 'proofread,' 'polish this,' 'make this better,' 'copy sweep,' 'tighten this up,' 'this reads awkwardly,' 'clean up this text,' 'too wordy,' 'sharpen the messaging,' 'refresh this content,' 'update this page,' 'this content is outdated,' or 'content audit.' Use this when the user already has copy and wants it improved or refreshed rather than rewritten from scratch. For writing new copy, see copywriting.
copy-editing.author: coreyhaines31
copy-editing.display_desc: 帮你润色、收紧、翻新已有的营销文案，不用从零开始。
copy-editing.scenario: 你刚写完一段产品介绍，读起来别扭，想让AI帮忙改得更顺、更抓人。

copywriting.name: copywriting
copywriting.description: When the user wants to write, rewrite, or improve marketing copy for any page — including homepage, landing pages, pricing pages, feature pages, about pages, or product pages. Also use when the user says "write copy for," "improve this copy," "rewrite this page," "marketing copy," "headline help," "CTA copy," "value proposition," "tagline," "subheadline," "hero section copy," "above the fold," "this copy is weak," "make this more compelling," or "help me describe my product." Use this whenever someone is working on website text that needs to persuade or convert. For email copy, see emails. For popup copy, see popups. For editing existing copy, see copy-editing. For the offer underneath the copy (bonuses, guarantees, value framing), see offers.
copywriting.author: coreyhaines31
copywriting.display_name: 别让文案像说明书，要让人想下单
copywriting.display_desc: 帮你把官网、落地页、产品页的文案改得更有说服力，用户看了就想行动。
copywriting.scenario: 写首页、定价页、功能介绍页时，觉得文案干巴巴，用户没感觉。

create-auth-skill.name: create-auth
create-auth-skill.description: Scaffold and implement authentication in TypeScript/JavaScript apps using Better Auth. Detect frameworks, configure database adapters, set up route handlers, add OAuth providers, and create auth UI pages. Use when users want to add login, sign-up, or authentication to a new or existing project with Better Auth.
create-auth-skill.author: better-auth
create-auth-skill.display_name: 别自己写登录了，用这个脚手架
create-auth-skill.display_desc: 自动帮你搭好 Better Auth 的登录、注册、OAuth，省掉手写认证的麻烦。
create-auth-skill.scenario: 新项目或老项目要加登录功能，不想从零写认证代码时。

dependency-updater.name: dependency-updater
dependency-updater.description: Smart dependency management for any language. Auto-detects project type, applies safe updates automatically, prompts for major versions, diagnoses and fixes dependency issues.
dependency-updater.author: softaworks
dependency-updater.display_name: 依赖别乱升，先让 AI 帮你把把脉
dependency-updater.display_desc: 自动识别项目类型，安全更新小版本，大版本会问你一声，还能诊断修复依赖问题。
dependency-updater.scenario: 接手老项目或升级依赖时，怕出兼容性问题，想安全又省心地更新依赖。

executing-plans.name: executing-plans
executing-plans.description: Use when you have a written implementation plan to execute in a separate session with review checkpoints
executing-plans.author: obra
executing-plans.display_name: 写好的计划别白费，按步骤执行到底
executing-plans.display_desc: 有了书面计划后，按阶段执行并自动检查进度，避免跑偏或半途而废。
executing-plans.scenario: 当你写好一份功能实现计划，需要分步骤执行并随时回顾进展时。

feedback-mastery.name: feedback-mastery
feedback-mastery.description: Navigate difficult conversations and deliver constructive feedback using structured frameworks. Covers the Preparation-Delivery-Follow-up model and Situation-Behavior-Impact (SBI) feedback technique. Use when preparing for difficult conversations, giving feedback, or managing conflicts.
feedback-mastery.author: softaworks
feedback-mastery.display_desc: 用SBI框架把难开口的话说清楚，对方不炸毛，问题能解决。
feedback-mastery.scenario: 要给同事提改进意见，又怕对方翻脸的时候。

gemini.name: gemini
gemini.description: Use when the user asks to run Gemini CLI for code review, plan review, or big context (>200k) processing. Ideal for comprehensive analysis requiring large context windows. Uses Gemini 3 Pro by default for state-of-the-art reasoning and coding.
gemini.author: softaworks
gemini.display_name: 代码写完了？让Gemini帮你审一遍
gemini.display_desc: 用Gemini 3 Pro做大段代码审查、方案评审，比人眼更细，比GPT更能吃大上下文。
gemini.scenario: 写完几百行代码或一份长方案，想快速找出逻辑漏洞或改进点时。

gepetto.name: gepetto
gepetto.description: Creates detailed, sectionized implementation plans through research, stakeholder interviews, and multi-LLM review. Use when planning features that need thorough pre-implementation analysis.
gepetto.author: softaworks
gepetto.display_name: 别急着写代码，先想清楚怎么做
gepetto.display_desc: 帮你做调研、访谈、多轮推演，把功能拆成可执行的步骤，避免边写边改。
gepetto.scenario: 产品经理或工程师在规划一个复杂功能时，用来生成详细实现方案，减少返工。

humanizer.name: humanizer
humanizer.description:
Remove signs of AI-generated writing from text. Use when editing or reviewing
text to make it sound more natural and human-written. Based on Wikipedia's
comprehensive "Signs of AI writing" guide. Detects and fixes patterns including:
inflated symbolism, promotional language, superficial -ing analyses, vague
attributions, em dash overuse, rule of three, AI vocabulary words, negative
parallelisms, and excessive conjunctive phrases.

Credits: Original skill by @blader - https://github.com/blader/humanizer
humanizer.author: softaworks
humanizer.display_name: 别让AI味太冲，改得像人写的
humanizer.display_desc: 自动检测并修复AI写作的常见套路，比如空洞的比喻、过度用破折号、AI高频词，让文字读起来更自然。
humanizer.scenario: 写完初稿后，用这个技能过一遍，把AI味去掉，避免被读者一眼识破。

marketing-ideas.name: marketing-ideas
marketing-ideas.description: When the user needs marketing ideas, inspiration, or strategies for their SaaS or software product. Also use when the user asks for 'marketing ideas,' 'growth ideas,' 'how to market,' 'marketing strategies,' 'marketing tactics,' 'ways to promote,' 'ideas to grow,' 'what else can I try,' 'I don't know how to market this,' 'brainstorm marketing,' or 'what marketing should I do.' Use this as a starting point whenever someone is stuck or looking for inspiration on how to grow. For specific channel execution, see the relevant skill (ads, social, emails, etc.).
marketing-ideas.author: coreyhaines31
marketing-ideas.display_name: 产品做出来了，怎么让人知道？
marketing-ideas.display_desc: 帮你从零开始想营销点子，不再对着产品干瞪眼，找到第一批用户。
marketing-ideas.scenario: 产品上线后，不知道怎么推广，到处问人“我该怎么卖”的时候。

marketing-psychology.name: marketing-psychology
marketing-psychology.description: When the user wants to apply psychological principles, mental models, or behavioral science to marketing. Also use when the user mentions 'psychology,' 'mental models,' 'cognitive bias,' 'persuasion,' 'behavioral science,' 'why people buy,' 'decision-making,' 'consumer behavior,' 'anchoring,' 'social proof,' 'scarcity,' 'loss aversion,' 'framing,' or 'nudge.' Use this whenever someone wants to understand or leverage how people think and make decisions in a marketing context. For applying psychology to specific pages, see cro; for pricing tactics, see pricing; for copy framing, see copywriting.
marketing-psychology.author: coreyhaines31
marketing-psychology.display_name: 用户为什么买？用心理学撬动营销
marketing-psychology.display_desc: 帮你把心理学套路（社会认同、稀缺、损失厌恶等）用到营销里，让人不知不觉想下单。
marketing-psychology.scenario: 写文案或设计活动时，想让用户更快做决定，但不确定用什么心理策略。

marp-slide.name: marp-slide
marp-slide.description: Create professional Marp presentation slides with 7 beautiful themes (default, minimal, colorful, dark, gradient, tech, business). Use when users request slide creation, presentations, or Marp documents. Supports custom themes, image layouts, and "make it look good" requests with automatic quality improvements.
marp-slide.author: softaworks
marp-slide.display_desc: 一句话告诉AI你要讲什么，它直接生成漂亮的Marp幻灯片，7种主题随便换。
marp-slide.scenario: 临时要做一个汇报PPT，但没时间排版设计，直接让AI帮你搞定。

meme-factory.name: meme-factory
meme-factory.description: Generate memes using the memegen.link API. Use when users request memes, want to add humor to content, or need visual aids for social media. Supports 100+ popular templates with custom text and styling.
meme-factory.author: softaworks
meme-factory.display_desc: 根据你的需求，自动生成带字表情包，聊天、发帖、做内容都能用上
meme-factory.scenario: 写推文或群聊时想加个表情包但找不到合适的，直接让AI帮你生成

mermaid-diagrams.name: mermaid-diagrams
mermaid-diagrams.description: Comprehensive guide for creating software diagrams using Mermaid syntax. Use when users need to create, visualize, or document software through diagrams including class diagrams (domain modeling, object-oriented design), sequence diagrams (application flows, API interactions, code execution), flowcharts (processes, algorithms, user journeys), entity relationship diagrams (database schemas), C4 architecture diagrams (system context, containers, components), state diagrams, git graphs, pie charts, gantt charts, or any other diagram type. Triggers include requests to "diagram", "visualize", "model", "map out", "show the flow", or when explaining system architecture, database design, code structure, or user/application flows.
mermaid-diagrams.author: softaworks
mermaid-diagrams.display_desc: 用Mermaid语法快速画出架构图、流程图、时序图等，省去拖拽对齐的烦恼。
mermaid-diagrams.scenario: 写技术文档或做方案时，需要画个类图或流程图，但又不想打开画图软件。

naming-analyzer.name: naming-analyzer
naming-analyzer.description: Suggest better variable, function, and class names based on context and conventions.
naming-analyzer.author: softaworks
naming-analyzer.display_desc: 根据上下文和规范，自动推荐更合适的变量、函数、类名，再也不用纠结命名了。
naming-analyzer.scenario: 写代码时想不出好名字，或者想统一团队命名风格时用。

plugin-forge.name: plugin-forge
plugin-forge.description: Create and manage Claude Code plugins with proper structure, manifests, and marketplace integration. Use when creating plugins for a marketplace, adding plugin components (commands, agents, hooks), bumping plugin versions, or working with plugin.json/marketplace.json manifests.
plugin-forge.author: softaworks
plugin-forge.display_name: 别手写插件了，用这个模板生成
plugin-forge.display_desc: 自动生成 Claude Code 插件结构、清单和市场配置，省去重复造轮子的功夫。
plugin-forge.scenario: 当你要开发一个 Claude Code 插件，却不想从零搭建目录和配置文件时。

programmatic-seo.name: programmatic-seo
programmatic-seo.description: When the user wants to create SEO-driven pages at scale using templates and data. Also use when the user mentions "programmatic SEO," "template pages," "pages at scale," "directory pages," "location pages," "[keyword] + [city] pages," "comparison pages," "integration pages," "building many pages for SEO," "pSEO," "generate 100 pages," "data-driven pages," or "templated landing pages." Use this whenever someone wants to create many similar pages targeting different keywords or locations. For auditing existing SEO issues, see seo-audit. For content strategy planning, see content-strategy.
programmatic-seo.author: coreyhaines31
programmatic-seo.display_name: 批量做SEO页面，别一个个手动写
programmatic-seo.display_desc: 用模板和数据自动生成大量SEO页面，比如城市页、对比页，省时又省力。
programmatic-seo.scenario: 当你需要为不同城市或关键词创建成百上千个类似页面时。

react-dev.name: react-dev
react-dev.description: This skill should be used when building React components with TypeScript, typing hooks, handling events, or when React TypeScript, React 19, Server Components are mentioned. Covers type-safe patterns for React 18-19 including generic components, proper event typing, and routing integration (TanStack Router, React Router).
react-dev.author: softaworks
react-dev.display_name: React 写 TypeScript 别裸奔，类型安全才是真香
react-dev.display_desc: 帮你写出类型安全的 React 组件和 hooks，告别 any 和运行时 bug。
react-dev.scenario: 用 TypeScript 写 React 组件、hooks 或事件处理时，想避免类型错误和重构噩梦。

react-native-best-practices.name: react-native-best-practices
react-native-best-practices.description: Provides React Native performance optimization guidelines for FPS, TTI, bundle size, memory leaks, re-renders, and animations. Applies to tasks involving Hermes optimization, JS thread blocking, bridge overhead, FlashList, native modules, or debugging jank and frame drops.
react-native-best-practices.author: callstackincubator
react-native-best-practices.display_desc: 帮你快速定位FPS、TTI、内存泄漏、动画卡顿等性能问题，给出优化方案。
react-native-best-practices.scenario: React Native应用出现掉帧、启动慢或列表滑动卡顿时，用它诊断并修复。

reducing-entropy.name: reducing-entropy
reducing-entropy.description: Manual-only skill for minimizing total codebase size. Only activate when explicitly requested by user. Measures success by final code amount, not effort. Bias toward deletion.
reducing-entropy.author: softaworks
reducing-entropy.display_desc: 帮你把代码库砍到最精简，只看最终代码量，不看过程多辛苦，倾向删除而非新增。
reducing-entropy.scenario: 当你觉得代码库越来越臃肿，想清理冗余但无从下手时。

requirements-clarity.name: requirements-clarity
requirements-clarity.description: Clarify ambiguous requirements through focused dialogue before implementation. Use when requirements are unclear, features are complex (>2 days), or involve cross-team coordination. Ask two core questions - Why? (YAGNI check) and Simpler? (KISS check) - to ensure clarity before coding.
requirements-clarity.author: softaworks
requirements-clarity.display_name: 别急着写代码，先问两个问题
requirements-clarity.display_desc: 开发前用两个问题（为什么做？能不能更简单？）把模糊需求聊清楚，避免白干
requirements-clarity.scenario: 接到一个复杂需求或跨团队协作任务时，先不急着动手，用这个技能确认方向

seo-audit.name: seo-audit
seo-audit.description: When the user wants to audit, review, or diagnose SEO issues on their site. Also use when the user mentions "SEO audit," "technical SEO," "why am I not ranking," "SEO issues," "on-page SEO," "meta tags review," "SEO health check," "my traffic dropped," "lost rankings," "not showing up in Google," "site isn't ranking," "Google update hit me," "page speed," "core web vitals," "crawl errors," or "indexing issues." Use this even if the user just says something vague like "my SEO is bad" or "help with SEO" — start with an audit. For building pages at scale to target keywords, see programmatic-seo. For adding structured data, see schema. For AI search optimization, see ai-seo.
seo-audit.author: coreyhaines31
seo-audit.display_name: 我的网站为什么没人看
seo-audit.display_desc: 快速找出你网站SEO的硬伤，告诉你为什么搜不到你、流量掉了该怎么办。
seo-audit.scenario: 当网站流量突然下降、排名消失，或者刚被Google更新打击时，用来诊断问题。

session-handoff.name: session-handoff
session-handoff.description: Creates comprehensive handoff documents for seamless AI agent session transfers. Triggered when: (1) user requests handoff/memory/context save, (2) context window approaches capacity, (3) major task milestone completed, (4) work session ending, (5) user says 'save state', 'create handoff', 'I need to pause', 'context is getting full', (6) resuming work with 'load handoff', 'resume from', 'continue where we left off'. Proactively suggests handoffs after substantial work (multiple file edits, complex debugging, architecture decisions). Solves long-running agent context exhaustion by enabling fresh agents to continue with zero ambiguity.
session-handoff.author: softaworks
session-handoff.display_name: 别让AI失忆，交接文档自动生成
session-handoff.display_desc: AI会话快撑爆了？自动生成交接文档，新会话无缝续接，不丢上下文。
session-handoff.scenario: AI会话上下文快满时，或你想暂停工作、明天再续时，自动生成交接文档。

ship-learn-next.name: ship-learn-next
ship-learn-next.description: Transform learning content (like YouTube transcripts, articles, tutorials) into actionable implementation plans using the Ship-Learn-Next framework. Use when user wants to turn advice, lessons, or educational content into concrete action steps, reps, or a learning quest.
ship-learn-next.author: softaworks
ship-learn-next.display_desc: 把教程、文章、视频里的知识，变成你能立刻执行的步骤和练习。
ship-learn-next.scenario: 刷完一篇技术教程或看完一个教学视频，想立刻上手实践但不知道从哪开始。

skill-creator.name: skill-creator
skill-creator.description: Create new skills, modify and improve existing skills, and measure skill performance. Use when users want to create a skill from scratch, edit, or optimize an existing skill, run evals to test a skill, benchmark skill performance with variance analysis, or optimize a skill's description for better triggering accuracy.
skill-creator.author: anthropics
skill-creator.display_name: 自己造个AI技能，别老用现成的
skill-creator.display_desc: 从零创建、修改或优化AI技能，还能测试效果、对比表现，让技能更准更靠谱。
skill-creator.scenario: 你想让AI干点定制活，但现成技能不好使，需要自己捏一个或改一改。

skill-judge.name: skill-judge
skill-judge.description: Evaluate Agent Skill design quality against official specifications and best practices. Use when reviewing, auditing, or improving SKILL.md files and skill packages. Provides multi-dimensional scoring and actionable improvement suggestions.
skill-judge.author: softaworks
skill-judge.display_name: 你的Skill写得像屎？让它自己审自己
skill-judge.display_desc: 自动给SKILL.md打分，告诉你哪里烂、怎么改，不用求人review。
skill-judge.scenario: 写完一个Agent Skill包，想快速检查质量、找优化方向时。

subagent-driven-development.name: subagent-driven-development
subagent-driven-development.description: Use when executing implementation plans with independent tasks in the current session
subagent-driven-development.author: obra
subagent-driven-development.display_name: 别自己扛，让AI小兵帮你干活
subagent-driven-development.display_desc: 把大任务拆成独立小任务，让AI自动分配执行，你只管验收结果。
subagent-driven-development.scenario: 当你有一堆并行子任务要执行，不想一个个手动指挥AI时。

systematic-debugging.name: systematic-debugging
systematic-debugging.description: Use when encountering any bug, test failure, or unexpected behavior, before proposing fixes
systematic-debugging.author: obra
systematic-debugging.display_name: 别急着修，先搞清楚 Bug 到底在哪
systematic-debugging.display_desc: 遇到 Bug 先别急着改代码，按步骤定位根因，省得修完又冒出新问题。
systematic-debugging.scenario: 测试挂掉或功能异常时，先别动手改，用它梳理一遍再修。

test-driven-development.name: test-driven-development
test-driven-development.description: Use when implementing any feature or bugfix, before writing implementation code
test-driven-development.author: obra
test-driven-development.display_name: 先写测试再写代码，少踩坑
test-driven-development.display_desc: 在写功能或修bug前，先写测试用例，确保代码逻辑清晰且不易出错。
test-driven-development.scenario: 当你准备实现一个新功能或修复一个bug时，先用测试明确预期结果。

ui-ux-pro-max.name: ui-ux-pro-max
ui-ux-pro-max.description: UI/UX design intelligence for web and mobile. Searchable local database with 84 styles, 192 color palettes, 74 font pairings, 192 product types, 98 UX guidelines, 104 icon entries, 16 GSAP motion presets, and 25 chart types across 22 stacks (React, Next.js, Vue, Nuxt, Svelte, Astro, SwiftUI, React Native, Flutter, Tailwind, shadcn/ui, Jetpack Compose, Angular, Laravel, JavaFX, WPF, WinUI, Avalonia, Uno Platform, UWP, Three.js, and HTML/CSS). Use when designing, building, or reviewing UI: pages, components, color schemes, typography, layout, accessibility, animation, or data visualization.
ui-ux-pro-max.author: nextlevelbuilder
ui-ux-pro-max.display_name: UI设计灵感库，不用再翻Dribbble了
ui-ux-pro-max.display_desc: 内置84种风格、192套配色、74组字体搭配，覆盖22个前端框架，设计时直接查，不用到处搜素材。
ui-ux-pro-max.scenario: 做页面或组件设计时，需要快速参考配色、字体或布局方案，又不想切出去翻设计网站。

vercel-react-best-practices.name: vercel-react-best-practices
vercel-react-best-practices.description: React and Next.js performance optimization guidelines from Vercel Engineering. This skill should be used when writing, reviewing, or refactoring React/Next.js code to ensure optimal performance patterns. Triggers on tasks involving React components, Next.js pages, data fetching, bundle optimization, or performance improvements.
vercel-react-best-practices.author: vercel-labs
vercel-react-best-practices.display_desc: 写React/Next.js代码时自动帮你检查性能坑，避免常见的渲染、加载、打包问题。
vercel-react-best-practices.scenario: 写React组件、重构页面、优化首屏加载速度时，用它来review代码。

verification-before-completion.name: verification-before-completion
verification-before-completion.description: Use when about to claim work is complete, fixed, or passing, before committing or creating PRs - requires running verification commands and confirming output before making any success claims; evidence before assertions always
verification-before-completion.author: obra
verification-before-completion.display_name: 别急着说搞定了，先跑一遍验证
verification-before-completion.display_desc: 在提交代码或创建PR前，强制自己先跑验证命令并确认输出，避免空口说白话
verification-before-completion.scenario: 当你准备说'搞定了''修好了''通过了'时，先停下来跑一遍验证再确认

vue-best-practices.name: vue-best-practices
vue-best-practices.description: MUST be used for Vue.js tasks. Strongly recommends Composition API with `<script setup>` and TypeScript as the standard approach. Covers Vue 3, SSR, Volar, vue-tsc. Load for any Vue, .vue files, Vue Router, Pinia, or Vite with Vue work. ALWAYS use Composition API unless the project explicitly requires Options API.
vue-best-practices.author: hyf0
vue-best-practices.display_name: 别再用 Options API 了，上 Composition
vue-best-practices.display_desc: 写 Vue 3 时自动用 Composition API + TypeScript，避免踩坑，代码更干净
vue-best-practices.scenario: 当你接手或新建一个 Vue 3 项目，需要快速写出符合最佳实践的组件时

writing-plans.name: writing-plans
writing-plans.description: Use when you have a spec or requirements for a multi-step task, before touching code
writing-plans.author: obra
writing-plans.display_desc: 拿到需求别急着写代码，先让 AI 帮你拆步骤、排优先级，避免返工
writing-plans.scenario: 接到一个多步骤功能需求，心里没底怎么下手时
